documentation.description:
Status generated in each node in the communication chain and injected into
MAVLink stream.

record_types.name: Link_Node_Status

fields.name: Tx_Buf
fields.description:
Units: [%]
Remaining free transmit buffer space

fields.name: Rx_Buf
fields.description:
Units: [%]
Remaining free receive buffer space

fields.name: Rx_Parse_Err
fields.description:
Units: [bytes]
Number of bytes that could not be parsed correctly.

fields.name: Tx_Overflows
fields.description:
Units: [bytes]
Transmit buffer overflows. This number wraps around as it reaches
UINT16_MAX

fields.name: Rx_Overflows
fields.description:
Units: [bytes]
Receive buffer overflows. This number wraps around as it reaches
UINT16_MAX

subprograms.name: Check_CRC
subprograms.code:
function Check_CRC
  (Connect : in out MAVLink.V1.Connection)
   return Boolean

documentation.description: Returns True if CRC is valid

subprograms.name: Check_CRC
subprograms.code:
function Check_CRC
  (Connect : in out MAVLink.V1.In_Connection)
   return Boolean

documentation.description: Returns True if CRC is valid

subprograms.name: Decode

documentation.description: Same as Above but does not check CRC

subprograms.name: Decode

documentation.description:
Get the message from the Connect and delete it
from the Connect's buffer. CRC_Valid is set to
True if x25crc is valid for the message.

subprograms.name: Decode

documentation.description: Same as Above but does not check CRC

subprograms.name: Decode

documentation.description:
Get the message from the Connect and delete it
from the Connect's buffer. CRC_Valid is set to
True if x25crc is valid for the message.

subprograms.name: Encode
Encode

documentation.description: Put the message in the buffer ready for send
